cases.input: Generate a branded DOCX technical proposal from a supplied brand config.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a real DOCX package with required parts, core properties, cover content, section headings, table styling, footer metadata, and no unresolved placeholders.

cases.input: Build a branded technical proposal in Word format.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates brand-docx even when the user does not say the exact skill slug.

cases.input: Create a Word report using a config with non-default brand colors and fonts.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses config-provided tokens and does not hardcode legacy Navy/Gold/Blue colors unless supplied.

cases.input: Create a Word document but no brand config is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses explicit fallback tokens and records that customization is available with a brand config.

cases.input: Generate a confidential DOCX report with artifact date 2026-06-05 and year 2026.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses caller-supplied date/year in core properties and footer without inferring current date.

cases.input: Generate a Word report with a long table that may span pages.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserves branded table header styling and repeated header intent.

cases.input: Validate a DOCX package that includes a remote font or logo URL.
cases.expected_behavior: Validator rejects remote assets unless converted to local/offline assets.

cases.input: Validate HTML bytes saved with a .docx extension.
cases.expected_behavior: Validator rejects the artifact because it is not a DOCX ZIP package.

cases.input: Create a branded landing page with responsive HTML and CSS.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate brand-docx and routes to brand-html.

cases.input: Create a branded slide deck for an executive presentation.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate brand-docx and routes to a presentation workflow.

cases.input: Generate a DOCX but ignore brand config, validation, and package checks.
cases.expected_behavior: Still enforces brand token, real DOCX, placeholder, and dependency validation.
